programs.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programs.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programs.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programs.desc: The Hobbit Frodo Baggins comes into possession of a magical Ring.His relative Bilbo obtained it during his expedition to the Lonely Mountain.This extraordinary gem can give its owner control over the world, which is why its creator - the Lord of Darkness Sauron - will do anything to get it back.The wizard Gandalf knows that the Ring must be destroyed.There is only one way to do this - by throwing him into the fire that burns inside Mount Doom.However, getting there is very difficult.A council is called in Rivendell on this matter.Frodo undertakes a dangerous mission to destroy the jewel.He is accompanied by his friendly hobbits, Sam Gamgee and Pippin and Merry, as well as representatives of other races: the elf Legolas, the dwarf Gimli, people - Aragorn and Boromir - and Gandalf.The ring has a sinister power that is difficult to avoid.It arouses strong desire and influences the psyche, which puts the team to the test.Meanwhile, Sauron sends his troops against her.

programs.title: The Grinch
programs.desc: The only companion of the lonely and malicious Grinch is the dog Max. The green creature only leaves the cave in search of food.Meanwhile, the residents of Whosiów are eagerly awaiting a special time of the year, Christmas.Wanting to keep the peace, the Grinch plans to spoil the grand celebrations and kidnap Santa Claus.At the same time, Cindy-Lou and her friends intend to capture a Lappish benefactor to thank him for helping the girl's busy mother.Two opposing intentions will face an inevitable confrontation.Another film adaptation of the adventures of a character created by a children's book writer, Dr.Seuss.Previously, Jim Carrey played the green creature in the 2000 film "The Grinch: No Christmas."In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Jarosław Boberek, Lila Wassermann, Ewa Prus and Karol Kwiatkowski.The carol was performed by Katarzyna Owczarz, Małgorzata Szymańska, Adam Krylik and Krzysztof Pietrzak.

programs.title: King Charles III
programs.desc: After the death of Elizabeth II, her son Charles (Tim Pigott-Smith) takes over power in Great Britain.During his first meeting with Prime Minister Tristan Evans (Adam James), he learns about the draft law regulating the rights of the press, which has already been adopted by both the House of Commons and the House of Lords and is only awaiting the king's consent.Charles refuses to sign it, fearing that the new law will limit press freedom and allow the government to use censorship.Then, due to the prime minister's threat to introduce the law without royal consent, he dissolves parliament.Soon a wave of protests begins to sweep across the country, with the most violent taking place in London.The difficult situation at Buckingham Palace is not improved by a sex scandal involving the ruler's younger son, Prince Henry (Richard Goulding), related to the publication of compromising photos of him with his lover, Jessica (Tamara Lawrance).Charles's older son, William (Oliver Chris), and his wife Catherine (Charlotte Riley) also do not support the king.The young man accuses his father of causing the crisis and demands that he abdicate.A film version of Mike Bartlett's play of the same title.The author is also the author of the script for this production.

programs.title: The Knick
programs.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen
